name: Braised Chicken and Sausages w/ Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 lb Sweet or hot Italian sausage
3 medium Red or green bell peppers, cut into strips
4 lbs Chicken breasts, skinless and boneless, cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-quart Dutch oven over medium heat, brown the sausages on all sides. Drain and cool the sausages, reserving pan drippings. Slice into 1-inch diagonal pieces; place in a large bowl.
2. Drain all but 1 tablespoon of drippings from the pan. Add onion; cook over medium heat for 5 minutes. Increase heat slightly. Add red pepper; cook for 5 minutes. Add garlic; cook for 1 minute. Remove to the bowl with sausage.
3. Warm oil in the same pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken in batches so the pan is not crowded. Cook for 5 minutes per batch, or until browned on all sides. Add to the bowl with sausage.
4. Add wine to the pan, stirring to scrape up brown bits. Add tomatoes, parsley, basil, oregano, salt, and black pepper. Cover; bring to a boil. Stir in chicken and sausage mixture. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 25 minutes, or until chicken is just cooked. Add olives (if desired) during the last few minutes.
Dinner Plan: Remove 2/3 of the stew to 2 separate microwaveproof containers; cool, then freeze for later use. Serve remaining stew. (Approximate microwave times: Defrost 30 minutes: reheat 7 minutes, stirring once or twice.)
